5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:3.25in;"><p style="text-align:justify;">ጉርድ ሾላ ቴሌ፣ ትምህርት መሳሪያዎች ማምረቻ ድርጅት፣ ግብርና ምርምር ፣ ጃክሮስ አደባባይ በስተጀርባ፣አየር መንገድ ዴዲኬትድትደድ፣ጀሞነ&nbsp; -2 ኮንዶሚኒየም ፣ የስ ውሃ ፣ዓለምገና ማርስ 5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:35.5pt;"><p>&nbsp;</p><p>4</p></td><td style="background-color:white;border-bottom:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-left-style:none;border-right:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-top-style:none;height:55.15pt;padding:0in 5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:130.2pt;"><p>&nbsp;</p><p>ደብረማርቆስ&nbsp;</p></td><td style="background-color:white;border-bottom:1.0pt solid ዓ.ም</p></td><td style="background-color:white;border-bottom:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-left-style:none;border-right:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-top-style:none;height:55.15pt;padding:0in 5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:103.5pt;"><p>&nbsp;</p><p>የመልሶ ግንባታ ስራ ለማከናወን</p></td><td style="background-color:white;border-bottom:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-left-style:none;border-right:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-top-style:none;height:55.15pt;padding:0in 5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:3.25in;"><p style="text-align:justify;">ጎፍጭማ፣ዋበር፣አንጂም፣ዪኒቨርስቲ፣ኢንዱስትሪ፣ደ/ማርቆስ ውሃ፣ሉማሜ እና አማኑኤል &nbsp;ባታ፣ኢንዱስትሪ በከፊልሏ፣ ስላሴ፣አባይኩኑ ኮንዶሚኒየም፣አብማት/ቤት፣አብማቤ/ክ፣አዲሱ ፍ/ቤት ፣ አባ ብዙነህ ጉርድ፣ ገጠር መንገድ ኮንዶሚኒየም፣የተባበሩት፣አሮጌውሆስፒታልኮንዶሚኒየም፣ቤተ መንግስት፣ድብዛ ት/ቤት ፣5 ኪሎ፣ቦሌኮንዶሚኒየም፣እነራታ፣የጸድ፣ሮብገበያ፣ሊባኖስ፣ወንቃ፣ቸርተከል፣ፈንድቃ፣የውላ፣ደኤሊያስ፣ግራቅዳምን፣ደጋሰኝን፣አማኑኤል፣ደንባ፣ጭምት፣ጓይ፣ጎፍጭማ፣ኳሽባ ገዳም፣የጁቤ፣አምበር፣ሉማሜ</p></td><td style="background-color:white;border-bottom:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-left-style:none;border-right:1.0pt solid windowtext;border-top-style:none;height:55.15pt;padding:0in 5.4pt;vertical-align:top;width:158.6pt;">&nbsp;</td></tr></tbody></table></figure>
